# DM Electricals & Installation

> Licensed electrical contractor in Nairobi, Kenya — installations, CCTV, electric fence, fire & alarm systems, emergency repairs, and electrical products. Based on Mwihoko Road, Kasarani.

DM Electricals serves homes, businesses, and industrial clients across Nairobi with ERC-aligned work, transparent pricing, and 24/7 emergency response. The main site is a full visual brochure; additional **SEO landing pages** cover each core service, product line, and service area with unique URLs (see sitemap).

**Primary location:** Mwihoko Road, Kasarani, Nairobi, Kenya  
**Service area:** Greater Nairobi, Kiambu/Ruiru (by arrangement)  
**Phones:** +254 799 762 232 | +254 762 748 694 (Kenya)

## Site pages

- [Home / full site](https://dmelectricals.com/): Complete HTML page — services, products catalogue, projects, testimonials, contact form, WhatsApp.

## Service landing pages (Nairobi)

- [Electrical & industrial installation](https://dmelectricals.com/services/electrical-industrial-installation-nairobi.html)
- [Electrical fittings](https://dmelectricals.com/services/electrical-fittings-nairobi.html)
- [Appliance installation](https://dmelectricals.com/services/appliances-installation-nairobi.html)
- [Cables & wiring supplies](https://dmelectricals.com/services/electrical-cables-nairobi.html)
- [Electric fence](https://dmelectricals.com/services/electric-fence-nairobi.html)
- [Fire & alarm systems](https://dmelectricals.com/services/fire-alarm-systems-nairobi.html)
- [CCTV & security](https://dmelectricals.com/services/cctv-security-nairobi.html)
- [Wiring & rewiring](https://dmelectricals.com/services/wiring-rewiring-nairobi.html)
- [24/7 emergency electrician](https://dmelectricals.com/services/emergency-electrician-nairobi.html)

## Optional

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/ryanallanx4/dmelectricals): Source hosting. Regenerate SEO pages: `py -3 scripts/generate_seo_pages.py`
